dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Tax relief claim summary for {year}.
dashboard.reliefLimitsHint: Warnings appear when claims reach 80% of the annual limit.
dashboard.noReliefData: No relief data for this year.
dashboard.receiptHistoryEmpty: Upload your first receipt using the buttons at the top right.
dashboard.processingNotice: Receipts are being processed by the AI worker. Make sure {command} is running in the backend terminal.
dashboard.waitingNotice: Receipts are waiting for manual review (e.g. PDF) or queue processing.
dashboard.noReceiptsYet: No receipts yet. Upload JPG, PNG, WEBP, or PDF files to get started.
dashboard.listDescription: Showing the latest {count} receipts — scan and approval status.
dashboard.uploadDescription: JPG, PNG, WEBP, or PDF — max 10MB per file, up to {max} files at once.
dashboard.uploadSuccess: {message} Receipts are processing — refresh the dashboard in a few seconds.
dashboard.qrDescription: Generate a QR code to upload receipts from your mobile camera.
dashboard.qrSessionActive: Session active — scan with your phone
dashboard.apiUnavailable: Unable to reach the API server. Make sure FastAPI is running.
dashboard.claimsNotFound: Claims summary endpoint not found. Please restart the FastAPI server.
dashboard.qrSessionExpired: Session expired. Generating new QR code…
dashboard.yearEndReminder: Tax year {year} closes on {deadline} — review your receipts and ensure all claims are recorded.
dashboard.compareByCategoryHint: Approved claim comparison by relief category.

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.subtitle: View and manage all your tax receipts.
receipts.invalidFilters: Invalid filter parameters. Please try again.
receipts.noReceiptsHint: No receipts found. Try changing filters or upload a new receipt using the buttons at the top right.
receipts.listSectionDescription: {total} receipts recorded — edit category or delete unneeded receipts.
receipts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this receipt?
receipts.lineItemsDescription: Toggle which line items to include in your claim. Amount is calculated automatically.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your tax receipts.
auth.registerSubtitle: Start scanning and tracking your tax relief receipts.
auth.verifyEmailMessage: We sent a verification link to {email}.
auth.verifyEmailBanner: Please verify your email address ({email}) to unlock all features.
auth.verifyEmailPendingHint: Check your inbox at {email} for the verification link. In dev mode, the link is printed in the backend log.
auth.loginSuccessRegistered: Registration successful. Please log in with your email and password.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and tax preferences.
settings.profileDescription: Update your full name, current tax year, and estimated tax bracket for savings calculations.
settings.sessionsDescription: Devices currently signed in to your account.
settings.notificationsDescription: Control how you receive receipt nudges and monthly digests.
settings.inAppEnabledHint: Show smart nudges on your dashboard.
settings.emailEnabledHint: Send calendar nudges and digests by email.
settings.digestFrequencyHint: Summary email at the start of each month.
settings.forwardingDescription: Forward e-receipt PDFs or images to this address for automatic processing.
settings.forwardingComingSoon: This feature is coming in a future update.

org.title: Organization
org.subtitle: Manage your organization policy and employees.
org.policyDescription: Configure tax year and approval rules for your organization.
org.rejectDialogDescription: Add a comment explaining why this receipt was rejected.
org.bulkConfirmDescription: This will approve {total} pending receipts for the selected tax year.
org.inviteCsvPlaceholder: Bulk CSV import is available in the employee list below (Phase 6 preview).
org.employeesEmpty: No employees found. Invite new employees using the invitation form.

join.invalidDescription: This invitation link is invalid, has already been used, or has expired.
join.invalidDescriptionBm: Jemputan tidak sah atau telah tamat tempoh.

readyToFile.title: Ready to File — Borang BE
readyToFile.subtitle: LHDN e-Filing guide for assessment year {year}.
readyToFile.fieldsHint: Enter these amounts in MyTax — only approved receipts are included.
readyToFile.noApprovedClaims: No approved claims for this year yet.
readyToFile.checklistHint: Follow these steps when logging in to MyTax.
readyToFile.pendingNotice: {count} receipts still pending approval — totals below may change.
readyToFile.disclaimer: Resit.my does not submit forms to LHDN. Use as a reference guide only during e-Filing.
readyToFile.loadError: Failed to load Borang BE guide.
readyToFile.filingTableHint: Enter these amounts in MyTax when e-Filing.

errors.sessionExpired: Session expired or server unavailable. Please log in again.
errors.serverUnavailable: Unable to reach the server. Please try again.

completeness.title: Claim completeness
completeness.subtitle: How thoroughly you're tracking relief for {year}.

household.title: Household
household.subtitle: Link your spouse to plan joint relief usage before filing.
household.linkDescription: Both parties must approve the link before sharing relief data.
household.incomingDescription: Approve or decline spouse link requests.
household.outgoingDescription: Waiting for your spouse to accept the link.

manualReceipt.title: Manual entry
manualReceipt.description: Add a receipt without OCR — useful for faded thermal paper or missing scans.

orgExport.title: Payroll CSV export
orgExport.description: Download approved claims for payroll integration.

orgBulkImport.title: Bulk import employees
orgBulkImport.description: Paste or upload a CSV to invite employees (@{domain}).
